name: Coffee Liquor Dipper Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onion; sauté for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in cumin and chili powder, cooking until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
4. Mix in coffee liqueur and cook until the liquid reduces by half.
5. Stir in hot sauce, Worcestershire sauce, barbecue sauce, and salt. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Remove from heat; stir in honey.
7. Set aside to cool completely.
8. Prepare chicken wings by removing tips and cutting them in half at the remaining joint.
9. Marinate wings in the cooked sauce for at least 1 hour, or overnight in the refrigerator.
10. Preheat broiler. Place marinated wings on a broiler pan, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and broil for 5 minutes.
11. Turn wings over; brush with remaining sauce. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes.
12. Serve hot. Wings can be prepared up to one day ahead and reheated in the oven.
